content: Supabase free tier (2025/2026): 2 active projects, 500 MB database storage (no row limit, constrained by storage), 1 GB file storage, 50,000 MAU for auth, 5 GB DB egress, 5 GB storage egress, 500K edge function invocations, 200 concurrent realtime connections, 2M realtime messages/month. Projects pause after 1 week inactivity. For MEI MVP with hundreds of users and typical transaction volumes this is extremely generous.
